sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n26816" key="diquramboxw/na" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῑθῠραμβοχώνα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n26816.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">funnel of dithyrambs,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Μοῦσα</foreign> prob. in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">13.21</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theodorid.</author> </bibl>) (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-χανα</foreign> cod.).</sense> </entryFree>
